query:
SELECT 'reddit_accounts' AS source, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reddit_accounts WHERE userId = 1260001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'outreach_campaigns', COUNT(*) FROM outreach_campaigns WHERE userId = 1260001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'outreach_leads', COUNT(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE campaignId IN (SELECT id FROM outreach_campaigns WHERE userId = 1260001)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'post_history', COUNT(*) FROM post_history WHERE userId = 1260001;
